Description
io.forja.components.validation.fxValidator
 

  • Uses of Rule in io.forja.components.validation.fxValidator

    Methods in io.forja.components.validation.fxValidator that return Rule
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Rule<String>
    FxValidator.email(String message)
    Rule: string looks like an email.
    static Rule<String>
    FxValidator.matches(String regex, String message)
    Rule: string matches a regex.
    static Rule<String>
    FxValidator.maxLength(int max, String message)
    Rule: maximum string length.
    static Rule<String>
    FxValidator.minLength(int min, String message)
    Rule: minimum string length (only enforced when non-null).
    static Rule<Double>
    FxValidator.range(double min, double max, String message)
    Rule: number is within [min, max].
    static Rule<String>
    FxValidator.required()
    Rule: rejects null/blank strings ("Required").
    static Rule<String>
    FxValidator.required(String message)
    Rule: rejects null/blank strings with the given message.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Rule<T>>
    FxValidator.getRules()
    Returns an unmodifiable view of the configured rules.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> FxValidator<T>
    FxValidator.of(Rule<T>... rules)
    Convenience — creates a validator from a variadic rule list.
